# Shobs Academy

> Personalized online tutoring for K-12 students across Math, Science, English and more, with live classes, worksheets and quizzes from expert teachers.

Shobs Academy is an online tutoring platform serving K-12 students globally. Teachers deliver one-on-one classes, share notes and worksheets, run interactive quizzes, and track attendance and progress.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of Shobs Academy, subjects offered, and how to request a free demo class.
- [About](/about): Mission, vision, teaching approach, subjects, and contact information.

## Optional

- [Student Login](/student-login): Sign-in page for existing students.
- [Teacher Login](/teacher-login): Sign-in page for teachers.
- [Admin Login](/admin-login): Sign-in page for academy administrators.
